name: Tick Data: Historical Forex, Options, Stock & Futures Data
snippet: Tick Data's core product is clean, research-ready, global historical intraday data. Our offering includes institutional-grade quote and trade history.

name: ICE Proprietary Data
snippet: Our View Only service is a subscription to the web based ICE Trading Platform providing real-time access to trading activity across our Futures Markets.

name: Real-Time & Historical Tick Data with Nanosecond Precision
snippet: Databento provides cloud-based solutions for intraday and real-time tick data. Simple, fast access in Python, C++, and Rust.

name: ICE Data Services and OneMarketData to Offer Real-time Streaming
snippet: ICE Data Services will offer an on-demand tick data and analytics service, utilizing OneMarketData's OneTick platform.

name: Tick Data (Examples) - QuestDB
snippet: Tick Data is the most granular form of market data available. It captures every price change, every trade, and every bid and ask update.

name: Market data vendor of the year: ICE Data Services - Risk.net

name: Tickdatamarket
snippet: Tickdatamarkets collects every tick for all asset class types including equities, futures, interest rates, FX and cash indices, as well as full order book data.
